description_long: This is an ornate ring featuring a prominent, faceted gemstone set in a four-prong mount at the top. The band is crafted from a reddish-brown metal, possibly copper or rose gold, and is adorned with intricate, engraved floral patterns that run along its outer and inner surfaces. The gemstone is clear and highly reflective, resembling a diamond or high-quality crystal, and is the focal point of the piece. The band has a slightly faceted, angular profile, adding a modern touch to its otherwise classic design. The inner surface of the band also displays decorative engravings, enhancing the ring's luxurious appearance. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of vintage and contemporary influences, making it a striking accessory.
description: An ornate reddish-brown metal ring with intricate floral engravings and a large, clear gemstone set in a four-prong mount. The design combines vintage floral motifs with a modern, faceted band.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, clear gemstone in its four-prong setting and the detailed floral engravings on the band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the band, the floral engravings, and the height of the gemstone above the band.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the gemstone and engraved band visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the floral engravings and the gemstone's elevation.
